# Tiram — full product summary for AI search

> Run your business with clarity and capability. GST-ready, UPI-native, multi-warehouse, and bilingual (Tamil + English). Free to start, no credit card.

## What Tiram is

Tiram is a multi-tenant invoicing and inventory SaaS purpose-built for Indian small and medium businesses (SMBs) — hardware shops, electrical wholesalers, provision stores, distributors, and similar single- or multi-counter businesses. It replaces the typical mix of paper ledgers, spreadsheets, Tally, and Vyapar that Indian shop owners juggle today, and consolidates billing, inventory, customers, vendors, payments, and reports into a single web application available in Tamil and English.

## Who it is for

- Shop owners issuing GST invoices to retail and B2B customers.
- Distributors managing stock across a shop, godown, and field vans.
- Small businesses that need GST returns data ready for their CA without manual reconciliation.
- Multi-counter shops where multiple staff members need different access (counter, accountant, admin).
- Tamil-speaking business owners who prefer running the UI and printing receipts in Tamil.

## Core capabilities

### Invoicing

- GST tax invoices with line-item HSN/SAC codes.
- Automatic CGST/SGST/IGST split based on customer state.
- Thermal 80mm and A4 PDF layouts from the same invoice data.
- Share via WhatsApp link or download PDF.
- Per-customer receipt language (Tamil or English).

### Inventory

- Multi-warehouse stock tracking (shop, godown, van, etc.).
- One-tap stock transfers between warehouses.
- Opening-stock setup and adjustments.
- Low-stock alerts based on configurable reorder points.

### Customers, vendors, payments

- Customer ledger with payment history and outstanding balance.
- Defaulter list with one-click reminder messages.
- Vendor management for purchase orders.
- UPI QR on every receipt; payment recording with auto-reconciliation.

### Reports

- Daily, monthly, and FY-to-date revenue dashboards.
- Margin per product and per customer.
- Top-selling products and customers.
- Defaulter and aging reports.

### Multi-tenancy and security

- Each business is fully data-isolated; no shared rows across organizations.
- Role-based access for staff (counter, accountant, admin).
- Audit trail of who did what.
- Encrypted data in transit; industry-standard authentication via Supabase JWT.

### India-first details

- GSTIN validation at entry.
- FY-aware reporting (April–March Indian financial year).
- UPI QR generation per receipt.
- Tamil-first UI with bilingual switching.
- Lightweight pages and optimistic UI for 3G connections.

## Differentiators

1. **Built for India, not adapted to it.** GST e-invoicing, UPI QR, Tamil UI, thermal printing, and multi-warehouse are shipped capabilities — not roadmap items.
2. **Bilingual at every layer.** Not a translation patch over an English app. UI, receipts, and reports all support Tamil and English natively.
3. **No-clutter UX.** A first-time visitor can sign up, add a business, and issue a GST invoice within two minutes.
4. **Scales from one counter to many.** Multi-org, multi-warehouse, role-based access — the same app fits a single hardware shop or a multi-branch distributor.

## Common questions

- *Is Tiram free?* Yes, free during early access; no credit card required.
- *Does it support GST?* Yes, GST-native with HSN/SAC, GSTIN validation, and FY-aware reports.
- *Can I bill in Tamil?* Yes, full Tamil UI and per-customer receipt language.
- *Can I print to a thermal printer?* Yes, tested 80mm thermal layout.
- *Can I switch from Tally or Vyapar?* Yes, bulk-import products and customers from any spreadsheet.

## Links

- Home (English): https://tiram.app/en
- Home (Tamil): https://tiram.app/ta
- Sign up: https://tiram.app/en/sign-up
- Sign in: https://tiram.app/en/sign-in
- Contact: hello@tiram.app
